title: jasminum pedunculatum
intro: Jasminum pedunculatum, also known as the star jasmine or Chinese night-blooming jasmine, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Jasminum pedunculatum include its ability to alleviate anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual cramps, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, and its essential oil is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
